entry.title: Cold War 2.0 #77: Why the Iran War Is Far From Over | Tarik Cyril Amar
entry.summary:
Is the U.S. sleepwalking into a permanent conflict with Iran, or is there a deeper strategic "siege" at play? In episode #77 of Cold War 2.0, Kevork Almassian and historian Tarik Cyril Amar break down the escalating tensions in the Persian Gulf, the leverage of the Strait of Hormuz, and why diplomacy like the JCPOA and recent MOUs may have been destined to fail.
We also dive into Trump’s latest claims of election interference, the role of intelligence services in foreign elections, and a critical look back at Angela Merkel’s legacy—could the war in Ukraine have been avoided with different leadership in 2008?
Join us live every Friday for Cold War 2.0, where we examine the week's biggest geopolitical developments with historical context and strategic analysis.
📅 Every Friday 🕚 11:00 ET | 17:00 CET
📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
00:00 – Intro & Channel Update: New Weekly Schedule 01:21 – Analyzing Mainstream Media: The FT on Iran & the U.S. 06:50 – Iran’s Leverage: Control of the Strait of Hormuz 13:14 – Counterarguments: Is the U.S. Still in Command? 21:03 – Historical Analogies: Lessons from Napoleon and 1941 30:21 – Deterrence Strategies: Should Iran Pursue Nuclear Weapons? 40:12 – Target Selection: Why Iran Focuses on Bahrain and Kuwait 48:11 – Globalist Agendas & European Elite Capture 50:07 – Trump’s Claims: Election Interference & Chinese Influence 53:13 – The Role of Intelligence Services in Foreign Elections 59:34 – Ukraine & Merkel’s Legacy: Could the War Have Been Avoided? 01:08:26 – NATO's 2008 Bucharest Summit & Its Consequences 01:11:01 – Final Thoughts & Upcoming Weekly Content
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Geopolitics #ColdWar2 #Iran #USForeignPolicy #TarikCyrilAmar #SyrianaAnalysis
entry.content:
Is the U.S. sleepwalking into a permanent conflict with Iran, or is there a deeper strategic "siege" at play? In episode #77 of Cold War 2.0, Kevork Almassian and historian Tarik Cyril Amar break down the escalating tensions in the Persian Gulf, the leverage of the Strait of Hormuz, and why diplomacy like the JCPOA and recent MOUs may have been destined to fail.

We also dive into Trump’s latest claims of election interference, the role of intelligence services in foreign elections, and a critical look back at Angela Merkel’s legacy—could the war in Ukraine have been avoided with different leadership in 2008?

Join us live every Friday for Cold War 2.0, where we examine the week's biggest geopolitical developments with historical context and strategic analysis.

📅 Every Friday
🕚 11:00 ET | 17:00 CET

01:21 – Analyzing Mainstream Media: The FT on Iran & the U.S.
06:50 – Iran’s Leverage: Control of the Strait of Hormuz
13:14 – Counterarguments: Is the U.S. Still in Command?
21:03 – Historical Analogies: Lessons from Napoleon and 1941

entry.title: Trump's Massive Strike Plan for Iran | Elijah J. Magnier
entry.summary:
In this deep-dive analysis, renowned journalist and war correspondent Elijah J. Magnier joins us to unpack the reported U.S. plans for "devastating" strikes against Iran. We explore the strategic objectives behind these maneuvers, the critical role of global oil reserves, and the potential consequences of targeting Iranian infrastructure.
Magnier provides expert insight into Iran’s defensive capabilities, its leverage in the Strait of Hormuz, and why a ground invasion remains a geographical and military impossibility. We also discuss the shifting dynamics in Iraq, the legacy of the Soleimani assassination, and how regional players like the UAE are navigating the tension through strategic acquisitions like the Russian S-400 systems.
Follow Elijah J. Magnier: https://x.com/ejmalrai Read Elijah J. Magnier's Work: https://ejmagnier.com/
📌Support Syriana Analysis: If you value independent geopolitical analysis, please consider supporting our work so we can continue bringing you these deep dives:
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
00:00 – Introduction of Elijah Magnier 01:03 – Reports on U.S. Plans for Strikes on Iran 02:08 – Analysis of U.S. Strategic Objectives and Oil Reserves 05:05 – Potential Consequences of Striking Iranian Infrastructure 06:05 – Disagreements Over the Strait of Hormuz (MOU Paragraph 5) 09:52 – Speculation on a Strait of Hormuz Blockade 12:21 – Iran’s Leverage and Retaliation Options 15:55 – Evaluating the Feasibility of a Ground Invasion 17:21 – Geographical and Military Realities of Iran 21:00 – U.S. Relations with Iraq and the Legacy of Qasem Soleimani 23:44 – The Assassination of Abu Mahdi al-Muhandis 25:58 – Historical Context: U.S. Influence in Afghanistan and Iraq 28:07 – Iraq's Current Geopolitical Dynamic and U.S. Control 31:10 – The Need for Informed Advisors in the U.S. Administration 33:11 – UAE's Strategic Moves and Acquisition of Russian S-400s 37:46 – Integrating S-400s with Western Air Defense Systems 41:03 – Shift in Israeli Official Rhetoric and Accountability 44:50 – The Aftermath of October 7th and Regional Expansion 48:24 – Grand Ayatollah Sistani’s Evolving View on the U.S. 52:45 – Conclusion and How to Support Independent Analysis
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Iran #Trump #Geopolitics #ElijahMagnier #MiddleEast #StraitOfHormuz #USForeignPolicy #SyrianaAnalysis
entry.content:
In this deep-dive analysis, renowned journalist and war correspondent Elijah J. Magnier joins us to unpack the reported U.S. plans for "devastating" strikes against Iran. We explore the strategic objectives behind these maneuvers, the critical role of global oil reserves, and the potential consequences of targeting Iranian infrastructure.

Magnier provides expert insight into Iran’s defensive capabilities, its leverage in the Strait of Hormuz, and why a ground invasion remains a geographical and military impossibility. We also discuss the shifting dynamics in Iraq, the legacy of the Soleimani assassination, and how regional players like the UAE are navigating the tension through strategic acquisitions like the Russian S-400 systems.

Follow Elijah J. Magnier: https://x.com/ejmalrai

entry.title: LIVE From Iran: The Truth About Iran's New Supreme Leader | Ehsan Safarnejad
entry.summary:
The death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has transformed Iran's political landscape—but who is his successor, and what is really happening inside the country?
Joining me LIVE from Iran, political analyst Ehsan Safarnejad shares his firsthand experience after attending the funeral of Ayatollah Khamenei and explains the realities behind Iran's new Supreme Leader, the public mood, and the country's evolving political system.
We also examine the renewed military confrontation between the United States and Iran, why the latest diplomatic efforts appear to be collapsing, and whether the region is entering a prolonged period of escalation.
Follow Ehsan Safarnejad on X: https://x.com/Safarnejad_IR/ and check out his channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCn-_UlidwJz0jTP1opyZbmw
📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
00:00 Introduction and technical updates 00:51 Reflections on the historic funeral processions in Iran 03:11 The feeling of unity and camaraderie in Tehran 07:33 Addressing separatist threats and "Fifth Column" tactics 09:16 Popular approval vs. government criticism: Analyzing the political system 12:35 The role and popularity of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Husseini 16:47 Debunking rumors: Is there a "Military Coup" or leadership shadow? 20:17 The Proclamation: Understanding the Supreme Leader’s authority 27:02 The Memorandum of Understanding (MOU): Tactical move or strategic failure? 34:01 Why Westerners (Pro and Anti) misunderstand the Iranian system 41:23 Exposing the "Mossad Plot" and the Mahmoud Ahmadinejad rumors 46:21 Kinetic vs. Psychological Warfare: Analyzing the 2025/2026 unrest 53:00 IRGC strategy and the character assassination of Iranian officials 58:19 Turkey’s F-35 deal and the potential for regional betrayal 59:14 Critiquing regional "Mediators" and the legacy of Qatar 1:06:50 The role of media in the Axis of Resistance 1:10:14 Final thoughts and how to support the channel
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Iran #MiddleEast #USIran #MojtabaKhamenei #Geopolitics
entry.content:
The death of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has transformed Iran's political landscape—but who is his successor, and what is really happening inside the country?

Joining me LIVE from Iran, political analyst Ehsan Safarnejad shares his firsthand experience after attending the funeral of Ayatollah Khamenei and explains the realities behind Iran's new Supreme Leader, the public mood, and the country's evolving political system.

We also examine the renewed military confrontation between the United States and Iran, why the latest diplomatic efforts appear to be collapsing, and whether the region is entering a prolonged period of escalation.

Follow Ehsan Safarnejad on X: https://x.com/Safarnejad_IR/ and check out his channel on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCn-_UlidwJz0jTP1opyZbmw

entry.title: 30 Minutes of Lindsey Graham Pushing for War
entry.summary:
Who is the real Lindsey Graham?
For decades, Senator Lindsey Graham has been one of Washington's most outspoken advocates of military intervention. From Iraq and Libya to Syria, Gaza, Iran and Ukraine, he has consistently argued for military escalation while dismissing the human cost of war.
In this episode, Kevork Almassian revisits Lindsey Graham's own words and public statements to examine his political legacy, his foreign policy record, and the consequences of America's interventionist doctrine.
Topics covered: - Lindsey Graham's calls for war across multiple conflicts. - His rhetoric on Iran, Gaza, Syria, Russia and Ukraine. - The human cost of interventionist foreign policy. - Has Washington learned anything from decades of war? - What does Lindsey Graham's record tell us about the U.S. foreign policy establishment?
This video presents publicly available statements for discussion and analysis. Viewers are encouraged to evaluate the evidence and draw their own conclusions.
📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#LindseyGraham #USPolitics #SyrianaAnalysis #ForeignPolicy #Geopolitics
entry.content:
Who is the real Lindsey Graham?

For decades, Senator Lindsey Graham has been one of Washington's most outspoken advocates of military intervention. From Iraq and Libya to Syria, Gaza, Iran and Ukraine, he has consistently argued for military escalation while dismissing the human cost of war.

In this episode, Kevork Almassian revisits Lindsey Graham's own words and public statements to examine his political legacy, his foreign policy record, and the consequences of America's interventionist doctrine.

Topics covered:
- Lindsey Graham's calls for war across multiple conflicts.
- His rhetoric on Iran, Gaza, Syria, Russia and Ukraine.
- The human cost of interventionist foreign policy.
- Has Washington learned anything from decades of war?
- What does Lindsey Graham's record tell us about the U.S. foreign policy establishment?

This video presents publicly available statements for discussion and analysis. Viewers are encouraged to evaluate the evidence and draw their own conclusions.

entry.title: Cold War 2.0 #76 | Is Israel Planning a False Flag Against Trump? | Tarik Cyril Amar
entry.summary:
In this episode of Cold War 2.0, Kevork Almassian and historian Tarik Cyril Amar dive deep into the latest geopolitical escalations. We begin by analyzing a viral clip of Professor Mohammad Marandi dismantling mainstream media narratives, before shifting to the Wall Street Journal’s explosive report on alleged Iranian "kill lists" targeting Donald Trump. Is this a genuine threat, or a calculated piece of disinformation designed to force a regional war?
We also examine the internal decay of the West, from Germany’s crumbling infrastructure to the European Union’s controversial new "Chat Control" legislation—a massive expansion of surveillance that threatens the privacy of every citizen.
Subscribe to Tarik's Substack: https://substack.com/@tarikcyrilamar
📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
0:00 - Introduction: Iran, the US, and International Law 01:56 - Analyzing Global Media Coverage & Journalistic Integrity 05:01 - Frozen Assets and the Iranian Nuclear Debate 06:58 - Western Elites: Perceptions of West Asia & Culturalism 11:46 - The Impact of Underestimation in International Relations 13:24 - Media Narratives: Responding to Alleged Political Plots 17:33 - Perspectives on International Legal Frameworks 24:07 - Reviewing the Safety & Recognition of Global Journalists 30:17 - Personal Reflections on Media Labels and Protection 35:12 - Historical Discourse & Civilized Conversation 38:38 - Shifting Public Sentiment & Diplomatic Relations 46:03 - Economic Analysis: Infrastructure & Industry in Germany 53:58 - Energy Policy, Diplomacy, and Demographic Shifts 59:22 - Regional Governance & Digital Privacy Legislation 01:04:25 - Surveillance Pretexts & Civil Liberties 01:10:05 - Closing Thoughts & How to Support the Show
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Geopolitics #Trump #Iran #SyrianaAnalysis #TarikCyrilAmar #ColdWar2
entry.content:
In this episode of Cold War 2.0, Kevork Almassian and historian Tarik Cyril Amar dive deep into the latest geopolitical escalations. We begin by analyzing a viral clip of Professor Mohammad Marandi dismantling mainstream media narratives, before shifting to the Wall Street Journal’s explosive report on alleged Iranian "kill lists" targeting Donald Trump. Is this a genuine threat, or a calculated piece of disinformation designed to force a regional war?

We also examine the internal decay of the West, from Germany’s crumbling infrastructure to the European Union’s controversial new "Chat Control" legislation—a massive expansion of surveillance that threatens the privacy of every citizen.

Subscribe to Tarik's Substack: https://substack.com/@tarikcyrilamar

entry.title: NATO’s Shadow Bank: How the West Plans to Finance the Next Great War | Mats Nilsson
entry.summary:
In this special broadcast, Kevork Almassian is joined by Mats Nilsson, senior analyst at the Dissident Club in Sweden, to peel back the layers of the recent NATO Ankara Summit. While mainstream headlines focus on diplomatic posturing, Nilsson reveals the emergence of a "transatlantic cash machine" designed to bankroll long-term militarization.
We dive deep into the creation of the "Defense Security and Resilience Bank," a multilateral entity that Nilsson argues is a nefarious tool to keep the West on a permanent war footing. We also discuss the shifting roles of regional players like Turkey and Israel, and why the ultimate target of these escalations may lie much further east than Ukraine or Iran.
Follow Mats Nilsson: https://x.com/mazzenilsson Follow Dissident Club: https://dissidentpodden.substack.com/
Topics discussed: - NATO's Ankara Summit: What's the alliance's new strategic direction? - Trump's meeting with Syria's new leadership and the future of the Golan Heights. - Will Turkey finally receive the F-35 despite Israeli objections? - Has the U.S.-Iran conflict entered a new and more dangerous phase? - Europe's military transformation after Ukraine. - What comes next for the Middle East?
📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
00:00 - Introduction: Welcoming Matt Nilsson 01:32 - Analyzing the NATO Summit in Ankara 02:50 - NATO as a "Transatlantic Cash Machine" 05:18 - Turkey's Evolving Role & Regional Ambitions 07:44 - The Global Context: China as the Ultimate Target? 09:20 - Geopolitics of Greece & Russia Relations 13:55 - Israel & Turkey: Competition for Influence 17:35 - Analyzing Rhetorical Warfare vs. Reality 20:07 - A Critique of Western Security Priorities 25:02 - Shifting Perspectives within the United States 30:20 - NATO, Iran, and the Strait of Hormuz 35:28 - Reactions to Diplomatic Conduct & Self-Respect 38:50 - Historical Context: The Erosion of International Law 44:06 - Territorial Claims and the "Greater Israel" Project 53:15 - Ukraine Strategy: Escalation or Negotiation? 01:00:26 - Long-term Strategic Outlook: A Cycle of Conflict? 01:09:40 - The "Defense Security and Resilience Bank" Explained 01:12:12 - Closing Thoughts: How to Support the Guests
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#NATO #MatsNilsson #SyrianaAnalysis #AnkaraSummit #Geopolitics
entry.content:
In this special broadcast, Kevork Almassian is joined by Mats Nilsson, senior analyst at the Dissident Club in Sweden, to peel back the layers of the recent NATO Ankara Summit. While mainstream headlines focus on diplomatic posturing, Nilsson reveals the emergence of a "transatlantic cash machine" designed to bankroll long-term militarization.

We dive deep into the creation of the "Defense Security and Resilience Bank," a multilateral entity that Nilsson argues is a nefarious tool to keep the West on a permanent war footing. We also discuss the shifting roles of regional players like Turkey and Israel, and why the ultimate target of these escalations may lie much further east than Ukraine or Iran.

Follow Mats Nilsson: https://x.com/mazzenilsson
Follow Dissident Club: https://dissidentpodden.substack.com/

Topics discussed:
- NATO's Ankara Summit: What's the alliance's new strategic direction?
- Trump's meeting with Syria's new leadership and the future of the Golan Heights.
- Will Turkey finally receive the F-35 despite Israeli objections?
- Has the U.S.-Iran conflict entered a new and more dangerous phase?
- Europe's military transformation after Ukraine.
- What comes next for the Middle East?

📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.

🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis
💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian
☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l
▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join

00:00 - Introduction: Welcoming Matt Nilsson
01:32 - Analyzing the NATO Summit in Ankara
02:50 - NATO as a "Transatlantic Cash Machine"
05:18 - Turkey's Evolving Role & Regional Ambitions
07:44 - The Global Context: China as the Ultimate Target?
09:20 - Geopolitics of Greece & Russia Relations
13:55 - Israel & Turkey: Competition for Influence
17:35 - Analyzing Rhetorical Warfare vs. Reality
20:07 - A Critique of Western Security Priorities
25:02 - Shifting Perspectives within the United States
30:20 - NATO, Iran, and the Strait of Hormuz
35:28 - Reactions to Diplomatic Conduct & Self-Respect
38:50 - Historical Context: The Erosion of International Law
44:06 - Territorial Claims and the "Greater Israel" Project
53:15 - Ukraine Strategy: Escalation or Negotiation?
01:00:26 - Long-term Strategic Outlook: A Cycle of Conflict?
01:09:40 - The "Defense Security and Resilience Bank" Explained
01:12:12 - Closing Thoughts: How to Support the Guests

📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.

📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.

#NATO #MatsNilsson #SyrianaAnalysis #AnkaraSummit #Geopolitics

entry.title: MI6’s Next Move: Is Venezuela the New Syria? | Kit Klarenberg
entry.summary:
Is the "Syrian Model" of regime change being exported to South America? Investigative journalist Kit Klarenberg joins us to discuss his latest findings on the arrival of the White Helmets in Venezuela following the recent earthquakes.
We dive deep into the history of the White Helmets—from their creation by British intelligence veterans to their role in alternative governance and propaganda in Syria. Is their deployment to Venezuela a humanitarian mission, or a "beachhead" for Western intelligence to penetrate Venezuelan state structures during a moment of extreme vulnerability?
We also explore the disturbing connection between Ukrainian military intelligence and al-Qaeda-linked groups in Africa’s Sahel region, and how these parallel strategies are redrawing the map of global proxy warfare.
Read Kit Klarenberg's investigations: https://substack.com/@kitklarenberg https://www.kitklarenberg.com/ Follow Kit on X: https://x.com/KitKlarenberg
📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
00:00 - Introduction: The White Helmets land in Venezuela 01:46 - Why Venezuela? Disaster relief or geopolitical beachhead? 03:00 - Supplanting the state: The White Helmets’ role in regime change 05:58 - The "Syrian Model" exported to South America 08:15 - MI6’s secret Venezuelan reconstruction unit 09:55 - Humanitarian groups as cost-effective influence mechanisms 13:48 - Creating alternative governance structures under humanitarian cover 15:10 - Emma Winberg and MI6’s history of covert influence 17:31 - Sanctions and the weaponization of earthquake aid 20:50 - Insidious infiltration: Inward advisors and intelligence cutouts 22:30 - The White Helmets clones: Lebanon and the Palestinian Civil Defense 25:09 - First on the scene: The 2020 Beirut blast mystery 28:08 - Mockery of evidence: Staged chemical attacks in Syria 32:36 - The double role of Qatar: Non-NATO ally or intelligence collaborator? 38:43 - Ukraine’s secret Al-Qaeda invasion of Africa 42:43 - Why Ukraine is targeting Russian influence in the Sahel 46:56 - Is Ukraine becoming a global proxy for Western interests? 50:51 - The risk of blowback: Destabilization threats in Europe
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Venezuela #Syria #WhiteHelmets #MI6 #Geopolitics #KitKlarenberg #SyrianaAnalysis
entry.content:
Is the "Syrian Model" of regime change being exported to South America? Investigative journalist Kit Klarenberg joins us to discuss his latest findings on the arrival of the White Helmets in Venezuela following the recent earthquakes.

We dive deep into the history of the White Helmets—from their creation by British intelligence veterans to their role in alternative governance and propaganda in Syria. Is their deployment to Venezuela a humanitarian mission, or a "beachhead" for Western intelligence to penetrate Venezuelan state structures during a moment of extreme vulnerability?

We also explore the disturbing connection between Ukrainian military intelligence and al-Qaeda-linked groups in Africa’s Sahel region, and how these parallel strategies are redrawing the map of global proxy warfare.

Read Kit Klarenberg's investigations: https://substack.com/@kitklarenberg
https://www.kitklarenberg.com/
Follow Kit on X: https://x.com/KitKlarenberg

📌 If you enjoy independent investigative journalism, consider supporting Kit Klarenberg's work and subscribe to Syriana Analysis for more in-depth geopolitical analysis.

01:46 - Why Venezuela? Disaster relief or geopolitical beachhead?

entry.title: BREAKING - Macron Arrives in Syria... Then Damascus Explodes
entry.summary:
French President Emmanuel Macron's landmark visit to Syria was overshadowed by explosions in Damascus, raising immediate questions about who was behind the attacks—and who stands to benefit from the timing.
In today's livestream, Kevork Almassian examines France's strategic objectives in Syria, the significance of the Damascus blasts, Netanyahu's controversial claims that Lebanese Christian villages sought annexation by Israel, reports that Donald Trump may approve Turkey's purchase of F-35 fighter jets despite Israeli objections, and the rapidly evolving balance of power in the Levant.
Topics discussed: - Macron's military and economic objectives in Syria - Who benefits from the explosions in Damascus? - Did the attacks send a political message? - Netanyahu's annexation claims and Lebanon's response - Trump, Turkey, and the reported F-35 deal - The new geopolitical contest over Syria and the Eastern Mediterranean
📌Support Syriana Analysis: If you value independent geopolitical analysis, please consider supporting our work so we can continue bringing you these deep dives:
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
01:00 - Introduction and welcome to the live stream. 01:06 - Macron’s appearance in Damascus: Mockery and questions. 02:12 - Analyzing Macron's visit to Damascus and its implications. 02:37 - Investigating the Damascus blasts: Who carried out the attacks? 04:03 - Jolani’s press conference: Presenting Syria as a stable trade hub. 05:20 - The 2006 gas pipeline offer and the origins of the Syrian conflict. 07:31 - Economic vs. Political sovereignty: The price of the "war of aggression." 11:26 - Comparing economic models: Sovereign Syria vs. the current "free" Syria. 13:30 - Personal reflection on the cost of living in Syria (2005-2010). 16:08 - Macron’s objectives in the Levant: Military and geopolitical goals. 17:49 - The future of Russian forces in Syria and the emerging power vacuum. 21:36 - Economic interests: French corporations and the Syrian market. 23:09 - Parallels with Venezuela: Inside jobs and foreign intervention. 24:34 - Announcement: Upcoming guests Kit Klarenberg and Mats Nilsson. 27:02 - Analyzing the blast footage: The "Double Tap" bombing strategy. 28:27 - Theories on the Damascus attacks: Rogue elements or regional players? 31:31 - Critiquing the hypocrisy of Western "democratic values" in geopolitics. 34:11 - Jolani’s role: Executive director of a project to sell out Syria. 36:10 - Behind the scenes of Syriana Analysis: Independent journalism. 39:03 - Elijah Magnier’s perspective: The political message of the explosions. 44:44 - Israel’s strategic dilemma and the balkanization of Syria. 51:55 - Addressing Netanyahu’s claims about Lebanese Christian villages. 58:02 - Lebanese officials debunking annexation requests. 59:35 - Israel’s territorial claims and the reality of occupation in Lebanon. 01:02:00 - Closing remarks and how to support independent journalism.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Syria #Macron #Damascus #France #MiddleEast #Israel #Lebanon #Geopolitics #SyrianaAnalysis #BreakingNews
entry.content:
French President Emmanuel Macron's landmark visit to Syria was overshadowed by explosions in Damascus, raising immediate questions about who was behind the attacks—and who stands to benefit from the timing.

In today's livestream, Kevork Almassian examines France's strategic objectives in Syria, the significance of the Damascus blasts, Netanyahu's controversial claims that Lebanese Christian villages sought annexation by Israel, reports that Donald Trump may approve Turkey's purchase of F-35 fighter jets despite Israeli objections, and the rapidly evolving balance of power in the Levant.

Topics discussed:
- Macron's military and economic objectives in Syria
- Who benefits from the explosions in Damascus?
- Did the attacks send a political message?
- Netanyahu's annexation claims and Lebanon's response
- Trump, Turkey, and the reported F-35 deal
- The new geopolitical contest over Syria and the Eastern Mediterranean

📌Support Syriana Analysis: If you value independent geopolitical analysis, please consider supporting our work so we can continue bringing you these deep dives:

01:06 - Macron’s appearance in Damascus: Mockery and questions.
02:12 - Analyzing Macron's visit to Damascus and its implications.
02:37 - Investigating the Damascus blasts: Who carried out the attacks?
04:03 - Jolani’s press conference: Presenting Syria as a stable trade hub.
05:20 - The 2006 gas pipeline offer and the origins of the Syrian conflict.
07:31 - Economic vs. Political sovereignty: The price of the "war of aggression."
11:26 - Comparing economic models: Sovereign Syria vs. the current "free" Syria.
13:30 - Personal reflection on the cost of living in Syria (2005-2010).
16:08 - Macron’s objectives in the Levant: Military and geopolitical goals.
17:49 - The future of Russian forces in Syria and the emerging power vacuum.

23:09 - Parallels with Venezuela: Inside jobs and foreign intervention.

#Syria #Macron #Damascus #France #MiddleEast #Israel #Lebanon #Geopolitics #SyrianaAnalysis #BreakingNews

entry.title: Iran After Khamenei: The Question Nobody Can Answer | Radical Thinker
entry.summary:
In this special stream, Kevork Almassian is joined by Andy from Radical Thinker to dive deep into the mysteries surrounding Iran’s leadership following the reported assassination of Ali Khamenei. While Mojtaba Khamenei has been named the successor, his absence from his father’s funeral has sparked intense global speculation. Is he injured, in hiding for security, or is something even more complex happening behind the scenes?
In this episode, we discuss:
- The Mojtaba Mystery: Why the new Supreme Leader stayed hidden during the most defiant moment for the Iranian nation. - The "Revenge" Doctrine: Analyzing the calls for justice from key Iranian military and political figures, and what a direct response against Western or Israeli assets could actually look like. - Russia’s Final Warning: The symbolism of Dmitry Medvedev’s appearance at the funeral and his stark comparisons between the Strait of Hormuz and nuclear weapons. - EU Censorship: We break down the latest European Union laws targeting independent media and the reposting of "banned" content.
Follow the Radical Thinker: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvJpN0vxULI9FjcCpOK4VPw
📌Support Syriana Analysis: If you value independent geopolitical analysis, please consider supporting our work so we can continue bringing you these deep dives:
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#Iran #Khamenei #MiddleEast #Israel #Geopolitics #SyrianaAnalysis
entry.content:
In this special stream, Kevork Almassian is joined by Andy from Radical Thinker to dive deep into the mysteries surrounding Iran’s leadership following the reported assassination of Ali Khamenei. While Mojtaba Khamenei has been named the successor, his absence from his father’s funeral has sparked intense global speculation. Is he injured, in hiding for security, or is something even more complex happening behind the scenes?

In this episode, we discuss:

- The Mojtaba Mystery: Why the new Supreme Leader stayed hidden during the most defiant moment for the Iranian nation.
- The "Revenge" Doctrine: Analyzing the calls for justice from key Iranian military and political figures, and what a direct response against Western or Israeli assets could actually look like.
- Russia’s Final Warning: The symbolism of Dmitry Medvedev’s appearance at the funeral and his stark comparisons between the Strait of Hormuz and nuclear weapons.
- EU Censorship: We break down the latest European Union laws targeting independent media and the reposting of "banned" content.

Follow the Radical Thinker: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCvJpN0vxULI9FjcCpOK4VPw

entry.title: Cold War 2.0 #75 | JD Vance’s Diplomacy Fail: The "Persian Tactic" Confusion | Tarik Cyril Amar
entry.summary:
In this episode of "Cold War 2.0," historian Dr. Tarik Cyril Amar joins Kevork Almassian to deconstruct the shifting landscape of US-Iran relations. We break down the "Forever Talks" strategy, the JD Vance "Persian Tactic" controversy, and the explosive new developments in the Nordstream investigation that Germany is seemingly desperate to ignore.
Topics covered:
-The "Persian Tactic" Myth: Why JD Vance’s confusion over technical vs. peace talks exposes a lack of diplomatic experience. -Trump’s Iran Dilemma: Is the US "buying time" with the 60-day MOU, or has Tehran already secured a de facto victory? -The Law of Zionism: Analyzing the racist assumptions behind the US-Israeli targeted assassination strategy. -Germany’s "National Masochism": Why Berlin is reacting with hostility to its own investigation into the Ukrainian Nordstream commandos. -The Energy Trap: How German elites are prioritizing ideology over the vital infrastructure required for industrial survival.
Join us live and share your questions in the chat.
WATCH more conversations with Tarik in our special playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLiReNnJYf0hLBGZv8NATxsgaOMJ0eifyy
📌Support Syriana Analysis: If you value independent geopolitical analysis, please consider supporting our work so we can continue bringing you these deep dives:
🛡️ Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/Syrianaanalysis 💳 PayPal Donations: https://www.paypal.me/kevorkalmassian ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/kevorkios1l ▶️ YouTube Membership: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UClvD6c1VI75QZWJjA_yiWhg/join
00:00 Introduction: Cold War 2.0 00:14 Iran Mourns Khamenei After Assassination 02:08 Did the US-Israel War Backfire? 05:37 Targeted Assassinations and International Law 08:00 Iraq, Syria and the Killing of Scientists 10:00 Washington Post: Did the US Warn Iran? 12:13 Tarik: Why This Leak Matters 15:53 Is This a Psychological Operation? 17:47 Western Media, Anonymous Sources and Intelligence Leaks 20:24 JD Vance on Iran, Oil and the MOU 22:42 Is Washington Using the MOU to Refill Oil Stocks? 26:29 Iran’s Nuclear Rights and US Confusion 30:28 WSJ: No Forever Wars, Only Forever Talks? 32:41 What Kind of Deal Would Iran Actually Sign? 34:42 Are “Forever Talks” Really a Problem? 36:14 Israel, Not Iran, Uses Endless Talks as a Weapon 39:13 JD Vance and “Persian” Negotiating Tactics 40:35 Technical Talks Are Diplomacy 101 42:04 Iran’s Negotiators vs Trump’s Team 45:05 YouTube, Wikipedia and Information Control 47:15 Germany, Nord Stream and the Ukrainian Case 53:31 Spiegel Defends the Destruction of Nord Stream? 56:27 Tarik Responds to German Authorities 58:15 Germany’s Energy Self-Destruction 59:22 Merz Targets Sick Leave in Germany 01:00:25 Why Merz’s Reform Is Mean and Stupid 01:04:33 Germany’s Political Paralysis 01:07:21 Closing Remarks
📢 Disclaimer: Guest opinions featured in this video do not necessarily reflect the views of Syriana Analysis.
📢 Syriana Analysis is an independent platform providing well-researched geopolitical insights, founded by Kevork Almassian. This program provides independent journalistic analysis for educational and documentary purposes, focusing on complex geopolitical shifts in West Asia and globally.
#SyrianaAnalysis #TarikCyrilAmar #JDVance #Iran #Geopolitics #Nordstream #Germany #USForeignPolicy
entry.content:
In this episode of "Cold War 2.0," historian Dr. Tarik Cyril Amar joins Kevork Almassian to deconstruct the shifting landscape of US-Iran relations. We break down the "Forever Talks" strategy, the JD Vance "Persian Tactic" controversy, and the explosive new developments in the Nordstream investigation that Germany is seemingly desperate to ignore.

Topics covered:

-The "Persian Tactic" Myth: Why JD Vance’s confusion over technical vs. peace talks exposes a lack of diplomatic experience.
-Trump’s Iran Dilemma: Is the US "buying time" with the 60-day MOU, or has Tehran already secured a de facto victory?
-The Law of Zionism: Analyzing the racist assumptions behind the US-Israeli targeted assassination strategy.
-Germany’s "National Masochism": Why Berlin is reacting with hostility to its own investigation into the Ukrainian Nordstream commandos.
-The Energy Trap: How German elites are prioritizing ideology over the vital infrastructure required for industrial survival.

Join us live and share your questions in the chat.
